pendingRecipeInput:
Zuchini carrots bread with egg and avocado:
1 Zuchini
1 Carrot 
1/2 Avocado
4 Egg s
Herbs(parley spring onion dill)
Mixed cheeze
Salt and pepper to taste

Preparation.
Grate/shred carrots and zuchini, sprinkle a half teaspoon of salt,wait until soft and squeeze,set aside,cut herbs and add to the shredded carrots and zuchini and mix well,add cheeze salt and pepper .In a baking tray spread the mixture and cook in 180 degrees wait until brown in the edge, 
cook eggs and slice avocado for feeling.
Preparation:30mins
Portion:2person
Substitute:guacamole and smoke salmon
